summary: User requested to delete/disable all existing deployed websites/app (remove everything).

existing_features.title: Provide an irreversible “Delete everything” action that, when confirmed by an authenticated admin/owner, permanently wipes all stored application data (booking leads, user profiles, uploaded rate card, and authorized staff list) and marks the site as deleted so the app is no longer usable.

When the site is marked deleted, block access to all app functionality for all visitors (including anonymous visitors) and show a dedicated “Site Deleted” screen instead of booking/profile/leads/rate-card pages.

new_feature_requests.summary: Delete everything / fully disable the deployed app so it is no longer accessible.
Enforce site-deleted access control on the backend so all user/admin operations are rejected after deletion, except for a lightweight mechanism to detect the deleted state from the frontend.
